title: PayPal Announces Strategic Reorganization To Accelerate Growth
text: PayPal announced strategic reorganization into three independent business units: Checkout Solutions & PayPal, Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, and Payment Services & Crypto. Restructuring aims to unlock value by enabling focused execution. CEO Lores stated reorganization would help recommit to fundamentals: get closer to consumers, align around three strong businesses, simplify operations. Reorganization requires near-term investments targeting $1.5 billion in gross run-rate savings over two to three years. Venmo separation viewed as potentially enabling future strategic alternatives.
